task_objective: Implement animated-status-icons plan (has_backup state in post-backup sequence, animated download icon, consistent amber warning cloud-X icons, amber conflict icon, updated HTML reference)
tests_added: Added RED test for has_backup state publishing in post-backup sequence
Added download-arrow-fill assertions for downloading status
Updated amber warning style test with new icon assertions
Added test for conflict amber color
design_decisions: Implemented has_backup status to bridge the gap between backing up and syncthing preparing phase
Replaced static Syncthing Download icon with animated version similar to upload, but pointing down
Updated warning icons to uniformly use an amber cloud-with-X
Save Conflict status now uses amber to denote attention needed
HTML reference explicitly updated with new keyframes, SVG paths, and wording to serve as a pure visual snapshot of changes
results: All tests pass. Pre-commit hooks and build succeed. Ready for handoff.
